summary: Iteration 5 - P0 Real-time Collaborative Editing Feature Testing Complete. All backend WebSocket tests passed (10/10). Frontend UI verified: presence avatars, live editing banner, search, navigation all working.
critical_code_review_comments: WebSocket endpoint /api/ws/collab/{doc_id} correctly implemented on app object (not api_router)
CollabManager class properly handles multi-user presence, content broadcast, mode changes
useCollaboration hook in frontend correctly connects to WebSocket via window.location.host
Auto-reconnect logic implemented (2s retry on close)
Save via WebSocket creates version entry before update - proper version history
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 collaborative editing fully tested. WebSocket endpoint at /api/ws/collab/{doc_id} works with query params user_id, name, color. Supports message types: content_update, cursor_update, mode_change, save. Frontend useCollaboration hook connects automatically. PresenceAvatars component shows other users. Editor shows 'Live editing' banner when editing existing docs. All 10 async WebSocket tests pass.

websocket_connection.details: WebSocket accepts connections, sends initial presence with user info

presence_rest_endpoint.details: GET /api/documents/{doc_id}/presence returns array of connected users

multi_user_presence.details: When 2 users connect to same doc, both see each other in presence updates

content_broadcast.details: content_update messages broadcast to all users except sender

mode_change.details: mode_change to 'editing' updates presence for all users

auto_save_via_websocket.details: save message persists content to DB, creates version, broadcasts doc_saved

cursor_broadcast.details: cursor_update messages broadcast cursor position and selection

disconnect_cleanup.details: Disconnected users removed from presence, remaining users notified

presence_avatars_ui.details: PresenceAvatars component visible in document viewer showing connected users

live_editing_banner.details: Editor shows 'Live editing' collaboration banner when editing existing docs

editor_save_button.details: Save button works, content persisted, returns to document viewer

search_functionality.details: Search shows categories, subcategories, documents with snippets

sidebar_navigation.details: Home, Bookmarks, Tools, Trash, Settings navigation all working

home_page_categories.details: Home page loads with category cards showing document counts
